faqs.question: What pests are most common in North Castle, NY?
faqs.answer: North Castle residents most frequently encounter ants, carpenter ants, spiders, mice, stink bugs, and occasional wasps or hornets. The area's wooded surroundings and seasonal weather changes contribute to year-round pest activity that requires professional management.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in North Castle?
faqs.answer: General pest control services in North Castle typically range from $175 to $300, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any service.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule pest control treatments in North Castle?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly pest control treatments for most North Castle properties to maintain year-round protection. However, treatment frequency may vary based on your specific situation, property type, and pest pressure. Our technicians will recommend the best schedule during your initial inspection.

faqs.question: Are your pest control methods safe for families and pets in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe application methods, and we can discuss low-toxicity options for sensitive environments.
